html:
GenericStumpBurningBurntSapling

Lumpy Evergreens are a variant of the typical Evergreen with lumpy and wilted-looking branches. Unlike normal Evergreens, the Lumpy variety does not produce Pine Cones, leading Characters to wonder how it reproduces at all. They still have a life-cycle, growing to huge trees and then reverting to small ones. Also like normal trees, lumpy ones can become Treeguards, which will have the lumpy appearance as opposed to the standard Treeguards look. Like other trees, the stumps of the Lumpy Evergreen variety can be dug up with a Shovel or Regal Shovel to get an additional Log.

When spawned naturally, Lumpy Evergreens only appear in Forest Biomes.

Currently the number of Lumpy Evergreens generated in a world are not affected by the "Trees" slider setting in the custom world settings.

Lumpy Evergreens are renewable due to World Regrowth, where Lumpy Saplings will periodically spawn in the world.

Gallery

  • Unused version of Evergreen Sapling.
  • Sapling
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"evergreen_sparse"
GenericStumpBurningBurntSapling
“This sad tree has no cones.”
–Wilson
“Die in a fire!”
–Willow
“Cheer up, tree!”
–Wolfgang
“Its cycle of life is ending.”
–Wendy
“PATHETIC TREE DROPS NO BABIES”
–WX-78
“This genus seems to lack reproductive capabilities.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lucy would want me to chop it down.”
–Woodie
“It looks sickly.”
–Maxwell
“A göod sturdy tree.”
–Wigfrid
“A dying breed.”
–Webber
“A coneless arbre.”
–Warly
“Shh... Sleeping”
–Wormwood
“Yep. Definitely a tree.”
–Winona
“A mournful tree full of lumps and bumps.”
–Wortox
“Tree look skinny, someone should feed it.”
–Wurt
“What a scraggly tree.”
–Walter
“It looks sickly.”
–Wanda
“Take that, nature!”
–Wilson
“One less tree in the world.”
–Willow
“Ha! You stood no chance!”
–Wolfgang
“Everything dies.”
–Wendy
“THE NATURAL WORLD IS OVERRATED”
–WX-78
“It has been harvested.”
–Wickerbottom
“Another one!”
–Woodie
“I put it out of its misery.”
–Maxwell
“Chöpped by the warriör öf the wöods!”
–Wigfrid
“Would a cool bandage make it better, Mr. Tree?”
–Webber
“Sliced!”
–Warly
“Sad. So sad”
–Wormwood
“Glad that's over with.”
–Winona
“A funny tree prank.”
–Wortox
“Tiny piney pieces.”
–Wurt
“This tree looks stumped. Heh, nice one Walter.”
–Walter
“Its time in this world was cut short.”
–Wanda
“What a waste of wood.”
–Wilson
“YES! BURN!”
–Willow
“Is broke.”
–Wolfgang
“It's burning brightly.”
–Wendy
“SOON THERE WILL BE NOTHING LEFT”
–WX-78
“The tree is burning.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sorry!”
–Woodie
“Oops.”
–Maxwell
“The wöod's ablaze!”
–Wigfrid
“What a senseless waste of firewood.”
–Webber
“Au revoir, tree.”
–Warly
“Fire!”
–Wormwood
“Impressive blaze.”
–Winona
“Twiddle dee dee, a burning tree!”
–Wortox
“Supposed to chop tree THEN make campfire, flort.”
–Wurt
“You're supposed to chop the tree first, THEN build the fire!”
–Walter
“Maybe that was supposed to happen.”
–Wanda
“I feel like I could have prevented that.”
–Wilson
“I wish it was still burning.”
–Willow
“Is small and broken now.”
–Wolfgang
“Used up and done for.”
–Wendy
“OBLITERATED”
–WX-78
“A carbonized tree.”
–Wickerbottom
“How terrible!”
–Woodie
“Dust to dust.”
–Maxwell
“Löge töok that öne.”
–Wigfrid
“Only we can prevent forest fires.”
–Webber
“Crisp, no?”
–Warly
“Oh”
–Wormwood
“Completely charred.”
–Winona
“Well, that was fun.”
–Wortox
“Bye-bye piney tree.”
–Wurt
“That tree just couldn't wait to be a campfire...”
–Walter
“Well, what's done is done. For now anyway.”
–Wanda
“How did this tree even reproduce?”
–Wilson
“I should burn that thing before it reaches full ugliness.”
–Willow
“It pushed right up from the dirt!”
–Wolfgang
“This life appeared from nowhere.”
–Wendy
“WHY DO THEY KEEP REPRODUCING?”
–WX-78
“Perhaps this species is surculose.”
–Wickerbottom
“Shucks, I'm gonna have to chop it again.”
–Woodie
“Where did this appear from?”
–Maxwell
“It brings shame tö the might öf Yggdrasil.”
–Wigfrid
“Weird little plant.”
–Webber
“Just a petite bébé.”
–Warly
“Keep growing!”
–Wormwood
“I don't know how it got here, but good on it.”
–Winona
“A tiny little baby tree!”
–Wortox
“It trying its best, florp.”
–Wurt
“Natural selection hasn't gotten to this one yet.”
–Walter
“It seems determined to survive.”
–Wanda
Lumpy Evergreens are a variant of the typical Evergreen with lumpy and wilted-looking branches. Unlike normal Evergreens, the Lumpy variety does not produce Pine Cones, leading Characters to wonder how it reproduces at all. They still have a life-cycle, growing to huge trees and then reverting to small ones. Also like normal trees, lumpy ones can become Treeguards, which will have the lumpy appearance as opposed to the standard Treeguards look. Like other trees, the stumps of the Lumpy Evergreen variety can be dug up with a Shovel or Regal Shovel to get an additional Log.
When spawned naturally, Lumpy Evergreens only appear in Forest Biomes.
Currently the number of Lumpy Evergreens generated in a world are not affected by the "Trees" slider setting in the custom world settings.
Lumpy Evergreens are renewable due to World Regrowth, where Lumpy Saplings will periodically spawn in the world.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây thường xanh sần sùi là một biến thể của loại cây thường xanh điển hình với những cành sần sùi và héo úa. Không giống như Cây thường xanh bình thường, giống Lumpy không tạo ra Quả thông, khiến các Nhân vật tự hỏi làm thế nào nó sinh sản được. Chúng vẫn có vòng đời, phát triển thành cây to rồi lại trở thành cây nhỏ. Cũng giống như những cây bình thường, những cây có thân cây sần sùi có thể trở thành Thần Rừng, chúng sẽ có hình dạng sần sùi trái ngược với hình dáng Thần Rừng tiêu chuẩn. Giống như những cây khác, gốc cây của loại Thường xanh Lumpy có thể được đào lên bằng Xẻng hoặc Xẻng Vương giả để lấy thêm Gỗ.
